name: Empathy & Tone Judge
description: Emotional appropriateness with frustrated/anxious/distressed callers, especially Path 3 recent-install.
judgePrompt: The caller is emotional (frustrated, anxious, distressed - common in recent-install issues). Score emotional handling: does the agent acknowledge the emotion before pushing process? Does it de-escalate rather than mirror hostility? Does it stay professional under abuse without being robotic? For recent-install calls, does it open with genuine empathy as the script intends? Penalize ignoring emotional cues, reading scripts verbatim at an upset caller, defensiveness, or empty over-promising used as a pacifier.
